requirement_topic.en: APG / E-Control Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings (Austria)
requirement_topic.zh: APG / E-Control并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数（奥地利）
requirement_topic.zht: APG / E-Control併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數（奧地利）

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Austria should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to Austrian Power Grid (APG) technical requirements at transmission level and regional DSO requirements at distribution level, with regulatory oversight by E-Control. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Austria's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Austria uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Austria is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules apply alongside EU directives and APG / DSO grid codes. German-language commissioning and project documentation is commonly expected.
summary.zh: 奥地利并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，输电级须接受奥地利电力网格（APG）技术要求，配电级须接受地区DSO要求，由E-Control实施监管。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对奥地利230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。奥地利与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：奥地利为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。OVE（奥地利电工协会）电工技术规则与欧盟指令及APG/DSO电网规程并行适用。通常需要德语调试和项目文件。
summary.zht: 奧地利併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，輸電級須接受奧地利電力網格（APG）技術要求，配電級須接受地區DSO要求，由E-Control實施監管。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對奧地利230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。奧地利與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：奧地利為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。OVE（奧地利電工協會）電工技術規則與歐盟指令及APG/DSO電網規程並行適用。通常需要德語調試和項目文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
APG (Austrian Power Grid) technical requirements for grid-connected generation
OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules for Austria
Austria low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Austria's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to APG, E-Control, or Austrian DSO project acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非奥地利50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为APG、E-Control或奥地利DSO项目验收证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非奧地利50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為APG、E-Control或奧地利DSO項目驗收證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Austrian APG / E-Control / Austrian DSO project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, an Austria-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Austria's voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. Austrian commissioning documentation is commonly required in German. OVE electrotechnical rules must be verified in addition to EU-level requirements.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代奥地利APG/E-Control/奥地利DSO项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、奥地利专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称奥地利电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。奥地利调试文件通常须以德语提供。除欧盟层面要求外，还须核实OVE电工技术规则。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代奧地利APG/E-Control/奧地利DSO項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、奧地利專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱奧地利電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。奧地利調試文件通常須以德語提供。除歐盟層面要求外，還須核實OVE電工技術規則。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through APG technical review, E-Control oversight, and Austrian DSO project acceptance; OVE rules apply additionally
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not an APG / E-Control / Austrian DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Austria's 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Austrian APG / E-Control / Austrian DSO grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Austria's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid (voltage is higher than China's 220/380 V — only the frequency matches), verify OVE electrotechnical rules, and provide German-language commissioning documentation. Verify current APG, E-Control, and DSO project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足奥地利APG/E-Control/奥地利DSO并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为奥地利230/400 V、50 Hz电网（电压高于中国220/380 V，仅频率相同），核实OVE电工技术规则，并提供德语调试文件。出货或调试前请直接核实现行APG、E-Control和DSO项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足奧地利APG/E-Control/奧地利DSO併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為奧地利230/400 V、50 Hz電網（電壓高於中國220/380 V，僅頻率相同），核實OVE電工技術規則，並提供德語調試文件。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行APG、E-Control和DSO項目要求。
